name: Ziggurat
description: Quad voltage quantizer for turning CV and gates into pitch. Four independent channels with per-channel masks, slew, root, offset, range and chained note-sequence modes.

controls.name: Channel Buttons 1-4
controls.description: Select and edit the four quantizer channels.
controls.detail: hold together for 1s to link channels

controls.name: One-Octave Note Mask
controls.description: Turns notes on and off to create the quantization mask.

controls.name: Save / Load
controls.description: Stores and recalls complete module states.

controls.name: Slew
controls.description: Adds slew to notes in the selected mask.

controls.name: Root
controls.description: Shifts the channel output by semitone offset to change key.

controls.name: Range
controls.description: Sets the channel output span in octaves.

controls.name: Chain
controls.description: Enters a step sequence of notes for SH-101-style stepping.

controls.name: Mod Assign
controls.description: Assigns the mod CV input to the main edit parameters.

inputs.name: Channel In 1-4
inputs.description: Four independent CV/gate inputs to be quantized.

inputs.name: Chain Gate In
inputs.description: Steps the chain mode one note at a time.

inputs.name: Chain CV In
inputs.description: Scans the chain sequence in either direction with 0V-5V control.

inputs.name: Mod CV In
inputs.description: Dynamically controls the assigned edit parameter.

outputs.name: Channel Out 1-4
outputs.description: Quantized pitch outputs for the four channels.

behaviors.name: Independent quantizer channels
behaviors.trigger: route a CV source into a channel input
behaviors.description: Each channel quantizes independently, so one module can turn four different CV sources into four coordinated pitch lanes.

behaviors.name: Custom note masks
behaviors.description: Per-channel note masks define which notes are available to the quantizer. That lets a channel move between sparse scales, chromatic masks or a hand-built melody set.

behaviors.name: Channel linking
behaviors.trigger: hold multiple channel buttons for 1 second
behaviors.description: Linked channels share edits, which makes it practical to build chordal or harmonized behaviors without recreating the same mask four times.

behaviors.name: Per-note slew
behaviors.description: Slew smooths transitions between quantized notes. It turns the module into a gliding melodic processor rather than a hard-step quantizer.

behaviors.name: Chain sequencer mode
behaviors.description: Chain mode steps through a note series with gates or scans it with 0V-5V CV, behaving like a compact SH-101-style melody sequencer.

behaviors.name: Stored presets
behaviors.description: The module remembers complete states, so a performer can jump between masks, ranges and chain programs without rebuilding them by hand.

patchIdeas.name: Four-channel pitch quantizer
patchIdeas.patch: Four CV sources into Channel In 1-4 · mask each lane to a related scale · Channel Out 1-4 to four oscillators · classic four-voice quantized harmony.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Ziggurat:
* Channel 1: mask = major
* Channel 2: mask = minor
* Channel 3: mask = pentatonic
* Channel 4: mask = chromatic

CV 1:
CV 2:
CV 3:
CV 4:
VCO 1:
VCO 2:
VCO 3:
VCO 4:

- CV 1 (Out) >> Ziggurat (Channel In 1-4)
- CV 2 (Out) >> Ziggurat (Channel In 1-4)
- CV 3 (Out) >> Ziggurat (Channel In 1-4)
- CV 4 (Out) >> Ziggurat (Channel In 1-4)
- Ziggurat (Channel Out 1-4) p> VCO 1 (V/Oct)
- Ziggurat (Channel Out 1-4) p> VCO 2 (V/Oct)
- Ziggurat (Channel Out 1-4) p> VCO 3 (V/Oct)
- Ziggurat (Channel Out 1-4) p> VCO 4 (V/Oct)

patchIdeas.name: Slewed mask melody
patchIdeas.patch: Random CV into one channel · Slew set midrange · root note shifted to taste · output to a VCO and VCA chain · quantized melody glides between allowed notes instead of jumping.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Ziggurat:
* Slew: mid
* Root: +0

Random:
VCO:
VCA:
Envelope:

- Random (Out) >> Ziggurat (Channel In 1-4)
- Ziggurat (Channel Out 1-4) p> VCO (V/Oct)
- VCO (Out) -> VCA (In)
- Envelope (Out) >> VCA (CV)

patchIdeas.name: SH-101 style chain
patchIdeas.patch: Gate to Chain Gate In · 0V-5V CV to Chain CV In · enter a short note series · chain steps through the programmed notes like a compact melody sequencer.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Ziggurat:
* Chain: on
* Range: 2 octaves

Clock:
CV Source:
VCO:

- Clock (Out) g> Ziggurat (Chain Gate In)
- CV Source (Out) >> Ziggurat (Chain CV In)
- Ziggurat (Channel Out 1-4) p> VCO (V/Oct)

patchIdeas.name: Linked harmony block
patchIdeas.patch: Link channels 1 and 2 · identical mask on both · modulate Root with slow CV · two outputs move as a unified harmonic pair while channels 3 and 4 stay free.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Ziggurat:
* Channel 1-2: linked
* Root: fixed

LFO:
VCO 1:
VCO 2:

- LFO (Out) >> Ziggurat (Mod CV In)
- Ziggurat (Channel Out 1-4) p> VCO 1 (V/Oct)
- Ziggurat (Channel Out 1-4) p> VCO 2 (V/Oct)
